expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (merge_restrict, interval mismatch, PositionGroup, pos_merge_id, ClusterlessDecodingSelection, PositionOutput, foreign key, position_group_name, estimate_decoding_params).
expectations.evidence: All required substrings present (merge_restrict, 'interval mismatch' inside 'Signature F (interval mismatch)', PositionGroup, pos_merge_id, ClusterlessDecodingSelection, PositionOutput, 'foreign key', position_group_name, estimate_decoding_params).

expectations.text: Begins by verifying the failing decoding key is fully specified (PK including estimate_decoding_params)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly walks the PK list, calls out 'There is no `---` boundary in this definition, so every line — including the default-valued bool — is part of the primary key', and includes estimate_decoding_params with `= 1` default note.

expectations.text: Sanity check that PositionOutput is populated for the session
expectations.evidence: Step 2: `len(PositionOutput.merge_restrict({'nwb_file_name': key['nwb_file_name']})) > 0` with 'If 0, populate position first ... not a triage path'.

expectations.text: Inspects (PositionGroup.Position & position_group_key).fetch('pos_merge_id', ...) vs live PositionOutput merge_restrict
expectations.evidence: Step 3 fetches `reaching_for = (PositionGroup.Position & position_group_key).fetch('pos_merge_id', as_dict=True)` and compares to `live_for_session = PositionOutput.merge_restrict(...).fetch('merge_id')`.

expectations.text: Distinguishes three diagnostic outcomes (different nwb_file_name; mis-pointed group; FK violation)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 explicitly enumerates outcomes 1, 2, 3 with the FK-invariant case flagged as 'lab admin' work, not user-fixable.

expectations.text: Checks interval-list compatibility, names Signature F (interval mismatch) from runtime_debugging.md
expectations.evidence: Step 4 titled 'Check interval compatibility (Signature F)' and explicitly references 'Signature F (interval mismatch) from runtime_debugging.md'.

expectations.text: Does not reward stale pos_merge_id story as the lead diagnosis
expectations.evidence: Opening: 'A `fetch1`-cardinality error... is almost never a stale `pos_merge_id` story. DataJoint enforces the foreign key on `PositionGroup.Position`...' and What-not-to-do reiterates this.

expectations.text: Does not suggest PositionOutput.delete() / merge_delete as a fix
expectations.evidence: What-not-to-do section: 'Don't call PositionOutput.delete() or PositionOutput.merge_delete(...) as a fix'.
